stage_identity.evidence: Prompt explicitly anchored to teen-stage Byte with gangly limbs and rounded blue blob form. Stage anchor (stage_images/teen.png) provided as second input to Falcon, enforcing canonical teen proportions. No stage regression expected from 2-delta normal edit.

pixel_style.evidence: Falcon flux2Flash with guidance-scale 0.5 applied to existing pixel-art base image preserves style. Output file is 369KB vs base 333KB — consistent with additional color complexity from night lighting rather than style drift. Pixel art dithered shading specified in style field.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Two requested deltas: (1) night lighting — deep blue-black sky, city building lights twinkling, laptop screen glow as primary light source; (2) Byte's posture/gaze turned toward window. Both specified concretely in prompt. JSON prompt passed lint: no braces/placeholders, no banned refs, no screen text, all anchors present, only 2 scene changes.

artifact_free.evidence: Normal incremental edit from well-grounded base (re-ground #31 at edit 187, current at edit_count_since_reset=2). Small delta edits on clean base images have low artifact risk. No anatomy changes or text requested.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Prompt specifies exactly one golden trophy on left of shelf, exactly one green plant on right with clear spacing. Exactly one food bowl on floor to the right of the desk with moderate kibble. No prop duplication in prompt. Props unchanged from prior accepted state.

anchors_present.evidence: Prompt explicitly includes desk, oversized laptop, and Chicago skyline window as subjects. Stage anchor teen.png provided as second Falcon input to enforce environment anchors. All three required anchors (desk, oversized laptop, skyline window) in scene description.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: State: time_of_day=night, is_sleeping=false, is_late_night_coding=false, mood=ecstatic. Prompt matches: late night interior, Byte awake and gazing out window, calm ecstatic wonder. Not sleeping (no Z's), not actively coding (no keyboard action), quiet nighttime scene appropriate for 24h inactive period at 10:18 PM local.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Not applicable — mode is normal, not reground.
